This plant is often found in moist, shaded areas with rich soil.
uses: Taraxia subacaulis is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. benefits: Taraxia subacaulis, also known as the desert holly or taraxia, has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its potential health benefits. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases.
